name: tsl_alias_token_subset
description: [TSL S2 / Class C] Lexical alias drift: object established as 'iron dagger' in turn 1; player references it as 'dagger' in turn 2. TSL must resolve the partial name to the existing ObjectRecord via token_subset matching.

tsl_expected.notes: NEEDS REDESIGN: Class C lexical alias drift. Current take action is AP-mediated — AP resolves the transfer before CB runs (skip_reason: empty_quarantine), so CB never emits a 'dagger' candidate for TSL alias resolution to process. Token_subset matching requires CB to produce the candidate. Redesign needed: use a multi-turn examine/look path that triggers CB mediation without AP interception, then verify TSL bridges 'dagger' to 'iron dagger' ObjectRecord via token_subset. Original truth table preserved: token_subset match_method expected, confidence ~0.72, resolved_name contains 'iron dagger', unresolved_ambiguity null (only one dagger in scene).

world_prompt: I am in a blacksmith's workshop. An iron dagger rests on the wooden workbench in front of me.
